game.forfeitMsg: Are you sure? You'll lose the game and be blocked for 3 hours.

shame.warning:
⚠️ Play better or you'll end up here.
The whole community can see you.
shame.emptyMsg:
Not enough players
with games for the hall yet.
phrases: THE ABSOLUTE DISHONOR OF THE BOARD
WHERE THOSE WHO NEVER LEARN GO
THE BOTTOM OF THE PIT — AND STILL DIGGING

blocked.title: 🔒 BLOCKED
blocked.hint: While you wait, you can play against the AI
messages: You lost. Again. Shocking. Come back in {tiempo}.
The board defeated you. Rest your wounded pride for {tiempo}.
Don't worry, even champions lose... though you're not one. Wait {tiempo}.
Blocked. Your 3 brain cells need recovery time. {tiempo} left.
The board isn't for everyone. Clearly not for you. Come back in {tiempo}.
Defeated, humiliated, and blocked. A perfect combo. {tiempo} to reflect.
Even basic AI would beat you. Rest {tiempo} and try again.

wildcards.title: Wildcards
wildcards.alreadyUsed: Already used a wildcard this turn
wildcards.shieldDesc: Blocks the next wildcard your opponent tries to use on you
wildcards.turboDesc: Gives you a full 30 seconds to make your move
wildcards.tiempoDesc: Opponent only gets 15 seconds for their next move
wildcards.confusionDesc: Opponent's X and O pieces appear swapped on their board for 1 move
wildcards.teleportDesc: Move one of your pieces to any empty cell without losing your turn
wildcards.earthquakeDesc: All of the opponent's pieces are randomly repositioned on the board
wildcards.freezeDesc: Opponent cannot make a move on their next turn
wildcards.sabotajeDesc: The opponent's last placed piece moves to a random spot

guide.title: Wildcard Guide
guide.subtitle: Master all board powers
guide.howToGetDesc: Buy wildcard packs in the Shop using your 💎 gems. You get 3 random wildcards per pack.
guide.howToUseDesc: You can only use 1 wildcard per turn. Some affect the rival immediately, others activate effects that last until the rival ends their turn.
guide.tipDesc: Save your Shield when you suspect the rival is about to use Confusion or Earthquake on you.

training.aiNoTimer: ⏱️ AI has no timer, no effect

onboarding.welcomeContent1: The most addictive game right now.
onboarding.welcomeContent2: Challenge real players in real time.
onboarding.welcomeContent3: Climb the ranks. Become a legend.
onboarding.rulesContent1: 🏆 Best of 3 — win 2 rounds to win the match.
onboarding.rulesContent3: 📩 When someone challenges you, you have 30s to accept.
onboarding.rulesContent4: ⚠️ Rejecting a challenge = -50 points + 30 min blocked.
onboarding.wildcardsContent1: ❄️ Freeze — opponent loses their next turn.
onboarding.wildcardsContent3: 🌀 Teleport — move one of your pieces to another cell.
onboarding.wildcardsContent4: 🛡 Shield — blocks the next enemy wildcard.
onboarding.wildcardsContent5: ⚡ Turbo — resets your timer to a full 30 seconds.
onboarding.wildcardsContent6: ⏳ Reduce — opponent only gets 15s on their turn.
onboarding.wildcardsContent8: 🌍 Earthquake — randomly rearranges all opponent's pieces.
onboarding.wildcardsContent9: 💎 Buy them with Gems earned in matches.
onboarding.fameContent1: 🥇 Ranking — the best players in the world.
onboarding.fameContent2: 💀 Hall of Shame — the worst losers.
onboarding.fameContent3: Will you be a champion or a disgrace?
onboarding.fameContent4: The app is viral — everyone will see your rank.
onboarding.fameContent5: Bring your friends and show who's boss!
onboarding.startContent1: ✅ Create your account or log in.
onboarding.startContent2: 🎮 Go to Home and challenge someone.
onboarding.startContent3: 📲 Share the app — make it viral!

winnerTitles: The living legend of the board
The one everyone fears to challenge
Nobody beats them, nobody equals them
loserTitles: Even their mom can't win for them
